title: acinos baumgartenii
intro: Acinos baumgartenii, also known as Baumgarten's marjoram or Baumgarten's thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, Acinos baumgartenii has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative properties. The health benefits of Acinos baumgartenii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and serve as an antiseptic agent to promote wound healing. Acinos baumgartenii can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and benefit from its health benefits.
